name: Candied Pickle Sticks
recipeIngredient: 1 quart Pickles, Sour Or Dill; Drain
1/4 cup Pickled Sweet Cherry Peppers (coarsely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the tips from the pickles and cut them into medium sticks.
2. Drain the pickles.
3. Mix the pickles and remaining ingredients in a glass bowl; cover.
4. Refrigerate for at least 12 hours.
5. Stir until all sugar is dissolved.
6. Pack the pickles into small jars, adding enough syrup to cover.
7. Cover and refrigerate for at least 24 hours before using, but no longer than 2 weeks.
Makes 1 quart of candied pickle sticks.
